title: Cannabis duty - Canada.ca
content:
## Services and information

### Apply for a cannabis licence from the CRA
Determine if you need to apply for a cannabis licence, eligibility conditions, how to apply for the licence, and what to expect after you apply

### Register for the cannabis stamping regime
Determine if you need to register for the cannabis stamping regime, how to register, and what to expect after you register

### Calculate the excise duty on cannabis
Determine if you need to pay the cannabis duty, how to calculate the duty and additional duty on your sales, view the adjustment rates, learn how to report the duty payable, and what records to keep

### Report and remit (pay) the duty on cannabis
Determine who has to file, when and how to file and pay, learn about authorized service agreements, and what records to keep

### Completing a cannabis duty return
Learn how to fill out the cannabis duty return, including detailed instructions on each section
- Canada Revenue Agency

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
